title: ReIndustrial Age
description: Retexture of IC2 which hopefully makes it a bit nicer
body:
IndustrialCraft is one of the first tech mods ever and is the great great great grandfather of the modern tech mod.
It adds machines which can double your output of ores, smelt things at a very fast pace and compress different items into other items.

This is great and all...

**But**

The textures dont hold up well at all.
They look dated, ugly and dont fit it in with the style of MC. This texture pack will hopefully help remedy this a bit.
All 32x32 item textures have been changed to 16x16. Some machine textures have been changed but theres still some left unchanged.





ReIndustrial Age at the moment is still WIP. Not everything has been changed and only 1.7.10 (the best version /hj) is supported. I do eventually plan on supporting 1.12.2 and maybe 1.6.4 but that will be only when im done with 1.7.10.
